Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Daniel Ray Bacon, Esq., appearing for plaintiff/moving party: Alberto Frigerio
Karen E. Kirby, Esq., appearing for Defendant/opposing party: CCSF

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Alberto Frigerio's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is denied as it seeks a further response. The court is not making a determination about the adequacy of any production made pursuant to these responses. Documents and a privilege log, except as to No. 16, shall be produced within 10 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
